---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the network module
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to see**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Why it's useful**
What problem does it solve, who benefits.

**Scope check**
Remember: changes must stay inside `Server/net/`, `Client/net/`, `Shared/net/`, `vendor/enet/` — the module must remain a drop-in replacement that works with unmodified MTA sources.
